        record: r,

import 'package:flutter/material.dart' hide Interval, Velocity;
import 'package:health_connector/health_connector_internal.dart'
    show
        Energy,
        Frequency,
        TimeDuration,
        Length,
        Mass,
        MeasurementUnit,
        Number,
        Percentage,
        BloodGlucose,
        Power,
        Pressure,
        Temperature,
        Velocity,
        Volume;
import 'package:ai_health/src/common/constants/app_icons.dart';
import 'package:ai_health/src/common/constants/app_texts.dart';


extension MeasurementUnitUI on MeasurementUnit {
  
  String get displayName {
    return switch (this) {
      Mass _ => AppTexts.mass,
      Number _ => AppTexts.numeric,
      TimeDuration _ => AppTexts.interval,
      Percentage _ => AppTexts.percentage,
      Length _ => AppTexts.length,
      Energy _ => AppTexts.energy,
      BloodGlucose _ => AppTexts.bloodGlucose,
      Power _ => AppTexts.power,
      Pressure _ => AppTexts.pressure,
      Temperature _ => AppTexts.temperature,
      Velocity _ => AppTexts.velocity,
      Volume _ => AppTexts.volume,
      Frequency _ => AppTexts.frequency,
    };
  }

  
  IconData get icon {
    return switch (this) {
      Mass _ => AppIcons.mass,
      Number _ => AppIcons.numeric,
      TimeDuration _ => Icons.access_time,
      Percentage _ => AppIcons.percent,
      Length _ => AppIcons.length,
      Energy _ => AppIcons.energy,
      BloodGlucose _ => AppIcons.bloodGlucose,
      Power _ => AppIcons.power,
      Pressure _ => AppIcons.pressure,
      Temperature _ => AppIcons.temperature,
      Velocity _ => AppIcons.velocity,
      Volume _ => AppIcons.volume,
      Frequency _ => AppIcons.favorite,
    };
  }
}

package models

import "time"

// SteelQuotationViewModel is a template-friendly shape for templates/quotation.html.
// Keep this decoupled from SteelQuotation DB model so we can compute/format fields safely.
type SteelQuotationViewModel struct {
	DocumentTitle string // e.g. "Quotation"

	Company CompanyVM
	Seller  SellerBankVM
	Buyer   BuyerVM

	Meta QuotationMetaVM

	Items []SteelQuotationItemVM

	Charges ChargesVM
	Totals  TotalsVM

	Terms TermsVM

	Footer FooterVM
}

type CompanyVM struct {
	Name        string
	LogoDataURI string

	AddressLine1 string
	AddressLine2 string
	Phone1       string
	Phone2       string
	Email        string
	Website      string

	CIN      string
	Since    string
	Subtitle string
}

type SellerBankVM struct {
	Name       string
	AccountNo  string
	BankBranch string
	IFSC       string
	City       string
	GSTIN      string
}

type BuyerVM struct {
	Name string

	AddressLine1 string
	AddressLine2 string
	AddressLine3 string
	AddressLine4 string

	GSTIN  string
	Mobile string
	Email  string

	PONumber string
}

type QuotationMetaVM struct {
	Dated       time.Time
	QuotationNo string
}

type SteelQuotationItemVM struct {
	SlNo int

	Description string
	Size        string // you can build from product (thickness/width/length) if available
	NoOfPcs     int32  // if not available in DB schema, you can set to 0 / 1 / omit in template later

	Quantity     float64 // template shows 105.000; your DB has int32 Quantity, so convert in mapper
	QuantityUnit string  // "Kgs" etc.

	UnitPrice float64
	PriceUnit string // "Rs/Kgs" etc.

	Amount float64
}

type ChargesVM struct {
	LoadingLabel  string
	LoadingAmount float64

	PFLabel      string
	PFAmountText string // currently "Extra" in HTML; keep as text so it can be numeric later

	GSTLabel  string
	GSTAmount float64

	RoundOffLabel  string
	RoundOffAmount float64
}

type TotalsVM struct {
	GrandTotalLabel  string
	GrandTotalQty    float64
	GrandTotalUnit   string
	GrandTotalAmount float64
}

type TermsVM struct {
	DutiesAndTaxes   string
	DeliverySchedule string
	PlaceOfDelivery  string
	PaymentTerms     string
	Validity         string
}

type FooterVM struct {
	CompanyName string

	RedLine1   string
	RedLine2   string
	RedLine3   string
	RedLine4   string
	Names      string
	HeadOffice string
	Branches   string

	Note string
}

package models

import (
	"database/sql"
	"time"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

const (
	TransactionTypePurchase  = "Purchase"
	TransactionTypeSale      = "Sale"
	TransactionTypeReturn    = "Return"
	TransactionTypeBlocked   = "Blocked"
	TransactionTypeUnblocked = "Unblocked"
)

type CustomerModel struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID uint    `json:"organisation_id"`
	FirstName      string  `gorm:"not null" json:"first_name"`
	LastName       string  `json:"last_name"`
	Email          string  `json:"email"`
	Phone          string  `gorm:"not null" json:"phone"`
	Address        string  `json:"address"`
	CustomerOrg    string  `json:"customer_org"`
	GSTIN          string  `json:"gstin"`
	Latitude       float64 `json:"latitude"`
	Remarks        string  `json:"remarks"`
	Longitude      float64 `json:"longitude"`

	// New structured address fields (kept alongside legacy Address for backward compatibility)
	AddressLine1 string `json:"address_line1"`
	AddressLine2 string `json:"address_line2"`
	City         string `json:"city"`
	State        string `json:"state"`
	PinCode      string `json:"pin_code"`
}

type Product struct {
	gorm.Model

	OrganisationID uint              `json:"organisation_id"`
	Name           string            `gorm:"not null;uniqueIndex:uniq_sku_per_org" json:"name"`
	SKU            string            `gorm:"not null;uniqueIndex:uniq_sku_per_org" json:"sku"`
	Description    string            `json:"description"`
	CategoryID     uint              `json:"category_id"`
	Category       InventoryCategory `gorm:"foreignKey:CategoryID" json:"category"`
	HSN            int32             `gorm:"not null" json:"hsn"` // Mandatory field with 4-8 numeric values
	SellingMargin  float64           `json:"selling_margin"`      // Selling margin as a percentage
	CGST           float64           `json:"cgst"`                // Options: 0, 2.5, 6, 9, 14
	SGST           float64           `json:"sgst"`                // Options: 0, 2.5, 6, 9, 14
	IGST           float64           `json:"igst"`                // Options: 0, 5, 12, 18, 28
	IsActive       bool              `json:"is_active"`
}

type ProductLedger struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID   uint       `json:"organisation_id"`
	ProductID        uint       `gorm:"not null" json:"product_id"`
	Transaction_type uint       `json:"transaction_type"`
	Price            uint       `json:"price"`
	Quantity         uint       `json:"quantity"`
	PONumber         string     `json:"po_number"`
	Status           string     `json:"status"`
	CreatedBy        int        `json:"created_by"`
	CreatedByUser    UserDetail `gorm:"foreignKey:CreatedBy" json:"created_by_user"`
}

type ProductEntry struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID  uint       `json:"organisation_id"`
	ProductID       uint       `gorm:"not null" json:"product_id"`
	Quantity        int        `json:"quantity"`
	ReferenceNumber string     `json:"reference_number"`
	CreatedBy       int        `json:"created_by"`
	CreatedByUser   UserDetail `gorm:"foreignKey:CreatedBy" json:"created_by_user"`
	Status          string     `json:"status"` // Confirmed, Quotationed
}

type Quotation struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID uint            `json:"organisation_id"`
	CustomerID     uint            `gorm:"not null" json:"customer_id"`
	CustomerModel  CustomerModel   `gorm:"foreignKey:CustomerID" json:"customer"`
	QuotationDate  time.Time       `json:"quotation_date"`
	ValidUntil     time.Time       `json:"valid_until"`
	PONumber       string          `json:"po_number"`
	Remarks        string          `json:"remarks"`
	Status         string          `gorm:"default:Open" json:"status"` // Open, Accepted, Rejected
	Loading        float64         `gorm:"default:0" json:"loading"`
	Freight        float64         `gorm:"default:0" json:"freight"`
	Pallet         float64         `gorm:"default:0" json:"pallet"`
	LoadingTax     float64         `gorm:"default:0" json:"loading_tax"`
	FreightTax     float64         `gorm:"default:0" json:"freight_tax"`
	PalletTax      float64         `gorm:"default:0" json:"pallet_tax"`
	TotalAmount    float64         `json:"total_amount"`
	Items          []QuotationItem `json:"items"`
}

type QuotationItem struct {
	CreatedAt      time.Time
	UpdatedAt      time.Time
	DeletedAt      sql.NullTime `gorm:"index"`
	ID             uint         `gorm:"primaryKey" json:"id"`
	OrganisationID uint         `json:"organisation_id"`
	QuotationID    uint         `gorm:"not null" json:"quotation_id"`
	SKU            string       `json:"sku"`
	ProductID      uint         `json:"product_id"`
	ProductName    string       `json:"product_name"`
	Quantity       int32        `json:"quantity"`
	UnitPrice      float64      `json:"unit_price"`
	Note           string       `json:"note"`
	Total          float64      `json:"total"`
	HSN            int32        `json:"hsn"`         // HSN code (max 8 digits)
	CGST           float64      `json:"cgst"`        // CGST percentage
	SGST           float64      `json:"sgst"`        // SGST percentage
	IGST           float64      `json:"igst"`        // IGST percentage
	CGSTAmount     float64      `json:"cgst_amount"` // Calculated CGST amount
	SGSTAmount     float64      `json:"sgst_amount"` // Calculated SGST amount
	IGSTAmount     float64      `json:"igst_amount"` // Calculated IGST amount
	CreatedBy      int          `json:"created_by"`
}

type Invoice struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID uint          `json:"organisation_id"`
	CustomerID     uint          `gorm:"not null" json:"customer_id"`
	InvoiceDate    time.Time     `json:"invoice_date"`
	DueDate        time.Time     `json:"due_date"`
	Status         string        `gorm:"default:Unpaid" json:"status"` // Paid, Unpaid, Overdue
	TotalAmount    float64       `json:"total_amount"`
	Items          []InvoiceItem `json:"items"`
}

type InvoiceItem struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID uint    `json:"organisation_id"`
	InvoiceID      uint    `gorm:"not null" json:"invoice_id"`
	ProductID      uint    `json:"product_id"`
	Description    string  `json:"description"`
	Quantity       int     `json:"quantity"`
	UnitPrice      float64 `json:"unit_price"`
	Total          float64 `json:"total"`
}

type AccountsReceivable struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID uint      `json:"organisation_id"`
	CustomerID     uint      `gorm:"not null" json:"customer_id"`
	InvoiceID      uint      `json:"invoice_id"`
	Amount         float64   `gorm:"not null" json:"amount"`
	DueDate        time.Time `json:"due_date"`
	Status         string    `gorm:"default:Pending" json:"status"` // Collected, Overdue, Pending
}

type InventoryCategory struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID uint   `json:"organisation_id"`
	Name           string `json:"name" gorm:"unique"`
	Description    string `json:"description"`
	IsActive       bool   `json:"is_active"`
	CreatedBy      uint   `json:"created_by"`
}

type ProductWithQuantity struct {
	Product  Product `json:"product"`
	Quantity int     `json:"quantity"`
	Blocked  int     `json:"blocked"`
}

package structure

import (
	"core-backend/m/v2/models"
	"time"
)

type UserWithoutGORM struct {
	Id        uint   `json:"id"`
	FirstName string `json:"firstname"`
	LastName  string `json:"lastname"`
}

type UserListResponse struct {
	Data []UserWithoutGORM `json:"data"`
}

// CreateUserRequest represents the request structure for CreateUser API
type CreateUserRequest struct {
	Email          string `json:"email" binding:"required,email"`
	Phone          int64  `json:"phone"`
	OrganisationId uint   `json:"organistion_id"`
	AccessCode     int    `json:"access_code"`
}

type UserDetials struct {
	FirstName  string    `json:"first_name" binding:"required"`
	LastName   string    `json:"last_name" binding:"required"`
	Email      string    `json:"email" binding:"required,email"`
	Address    string    `json:"address"`
	City       string    `json:"city"`
	State      string    `json:"state"`
	PostalCode uint      `json:"postal_code"`
	Phone      int64     `json:"phone"`
	StartTime  time.Time `json:"start_time"`
	EndTime    time.Time `json:"end_time"`
}

// UserDetailsResponse represents the response structure for GetUserDetailsByEmail API
type UserDetailsResponse struct {
	Id             uint      `json:"id"`
	FirstName      string    `json:"first_name"`
	LastName       string    `json:"last_name"`
	Email          string    `json:"email"`
	Address        string    `json:"address"`
	City           string    `json:"city"`
	State          string    `json:"state"`
	PostalCode     uint      `json:"postal_code"`
	Phone          int64     `json:"phone"`
	UserType       uint      `json:"user_type"`
	OrganisationID uint      `json:"organisation_id"`
	StartTime      time.Time `json:"start_time"`
	EndTime        time.Time `json:"end_time"`
}

type ErrorResponse struct {
	Error string `json:"error"`
}

type UserLocationResponse struct {
	UserId         models.UserID `json:"user_id"`
	StartTimestamp string        `json:"start_timestamp"`
	EndTimestamp   string        `json:"end_timestamp"`
	Latitude       float64       `json:"latitude"`
	Longitude      float64       `json:"longitude"`
	AreaName       string        `json:"area_name"`
}

type OrganizationRequest struct {
	OrgName         string          `json:"org_name"`
	OrgAddress      string          `json:"org_address"`
	WebsiteURL      string          `json:"website_url"`
	EntityType      string          `json:"entity_type"`
	Firstname       string          `json:"first_name"`
	Lastname        string          `json:"last_name"`
	AdminAddress    string          `json:"admin_address"`
	AdminCity       string          `json:"admin_city"`
	AdminState      string          `json:"admin_state"`
	AdminPhone      int64           `json:"admin_phone"`
	AdminEmail      string          `json:"admin_email"`
	AdminPostalCode int             `json:"admin_postal_code"`
	Status          string          `json:"status"`
	Size            int             `json:"org_size"`
	Features        models.Features `json:"features"`
}

type OrganizationResponse struct {
	ID         uint               `json:"id"`
	Size       int                `json:"org_size"`
	CreatedAt  string             `json:"created_at"`
	OrgName    string             `json:"org_name"`
	OrgAddress string             `json:"org_address"`
	WebsiteURL string             `json:"website_url"`
	Firstname  string             `json:"first_name"`
	Lastname   string             `json:"last_name"`
	AdminPhone int64              `json:"admin_phone"`
	AdminEmail string             `json:"admin_email"`
	Status     string             `json:"status"`
	Features   models.Features    `json:"features"`
	Days       models.WorkingDays `json:"days"`
	Cutoff     string             `json:"cutoff"`
	WeeklyOffs models.Features    `json:"weekly_offs"`
}

type UserListOrganisation struct {
	Id         uint   `json:"id"`
	Firstname  string `json:"first_name"`
	Lastname   string `json:"last_name"`
	Name       string `json:"name"`
	EmployeeId string `json:"employee_id"`
	JobTitle   string `json:"job_title"`
}

type ViewOtpMsg struct {
	Id  string `json:"id"`
	Otp uint   `json:"otp"`
}

type ViewTimeMsg struct {
	Id string `json:"id"`
}

type Timemsg struct {
	MessageId string `gorm:"primaryKey;autoIncrement:false" json:"message_id"`
	SenderId  uint   `json:"senderId"`
	DateTime  string `json:"datetime"`
}

type CheckIn struct {
	UserId           uint    `gorm:"primaryKey;autoIncrement:false" json:"user_id"`
	CheckIn          string  `json:"check_in"`
	CheckInImg       []byte  `json:"image"`
	CheckInLatitude  float64 `json:"check_in_latitude"`
	CheckInLongitude float64 `json:"check_in_longitude"`
}

type CheckOut struct {
	Id                uint
	UserId            uint    `gorm:"primaryKey;autoIncrement:false" json:"user_id"`
	CheckOut          string  `json:"check_out"`
	CheckOutImg       []byte  `json:"image"`
	CheckOutLatitude  float64 `json:"check_out_latitude"`
	CheckOutLongitude float64 `json:"check_out_longitude"`
}

type UpdateTask struct {
	TaskName     string `json:"task_name"`
	Description  string `json:"description"`
	AssigneeID   uint   `json:"assignee_id"`
	AssigneeName string `json:"assignee_name"`
	AssignedToID uint   `json:"assigned_to_id"`
	Status       string `json:"status"`
	Priority     string `json:"priority"`
	StartDate    string `json:"start_date"`
	DueDate      string `json:"due_date"`
	StartTime    string `json:"start_time"`
	EndTime      string `json:"end_time"`
}

type Project struct {
	ID        uint
	Name      string        `json:"name"`
	Tasks     []models.Task `json:"tasks"`
	StartDate string        `json:"start_date"`
}

// Inventory Management -----Store table represents the Store table in the database.

// StoreDTO defines a Data Transfer Object for Store----------
type StoreDTO struct {
	StoreName               string `json:"store_name"`
	Address                 string `json:"address"`
	Phone                   string `json:"phone"`
	GeographicalCoordinates string `json:"geographical_coordinates"`
}

// StoreResponse------------
type StoreResponse struct {
	StoreID uint `json:"store_id"`
	StoreDTO
	CreatedDate  string `json:"created_date"`
	ModifiedDate string `json:"modified_date"`
}

type ItemDTO struct {
	ItemName    string `json:"item_name"`
	ItemDetails string `json:"item_details"`
}
type ItemResponse struct {
	ItemID uint `json:"item_id"`
	ItemDTO
	CreatedDate  string `json:"created_date"`
	ModifiedDate string `json:"modified_date"`
}

// AttendanceResponse represents attendance data with IST formatted times
type AttendanceResponse struct {
	ID                uint    `json:"id"`
	UserID            uint    `json:"user_id"`
	CheckIn           string  `json:"check_in"`
	CheckOut          string  `json:"check_out"`
	CheckInLatitude   float64 `json:"check_in_latitude"`
	CheckInLongitude  float64 `json:"check_in_longitude"`
	CheckOutLatitude  float64 `json:"check_out_latitude"`
	CheckOutLongitude float64 `json:"check_out_longitude"`
	CheckInImg        []byte  `json:"check_in_img"`
	CheckOutImg       []byte  `json:"check_out_img"`
}

package models

import (
	"time"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Payslip represents a monthly payslip for an employee
type Payslip struct {
	gorm.Model
	UserID              uint    `json:"user_id" gorm:"not null;index:idx_user_month_year,unique"`
	OrganisationID      uint    `json:"organisation_id" gorm:"not null"`
	Month               int     `json:"month" gorm:"not null;index:idx_user_month_year,unique"` // 1-12
	Year                int     `json:"year" gorm:"not null;index:idx_user_month_year,unique"`  // 2024, 2025, etc.
	BaseSalary          float64 `json:"base_salary" gorm:"not null"`
	WorkingDays         int     `json:"working_days" gorm:"not null"`
	TotalLeaveDeduction float64 `json:"total_leave_deduction" gorm:"default:0"`
	NetPay              float64 `json:"net_pay" gorm:"not null"`
	GeneratedBy         uint    `json:"generated_by" gorm:"not null"`

	// Relationships
	User            UserDetail                `gorm:"foreignKey:UserID;constraint:OnUpdate:CASCADE,OnDelete:RESTRICT;"`
	Organisation    Organisation              `gorm:"foreignKey:OrganisationID;constraint:OnUpdate:CASCADE,OnDelete:RESTRICT;"`
	GeneratedByUser UserDetail                `gorm:"foreignKey:GeneratedBy;constraint:OnUpdate:CASCADE,OnDelete:SET NULL;"`
	LeaveDeductions []PayslipLeaveDeduction   `gorm:"foreignKey:PayslipID"`
}

// PayslipLeaveDeduction represents individual leave deductions in a payslip
type PayslipLeaveDeduction struct {
	gorm.Model
	PayslipID       uint      `json:"payslip_id" gorm:"not null;index"`
	LeaveID         uint      `json:"leave_id" gorm:"not null"`
	LeaveType       string    `json:"leave_type" gorm:"not null;type:varchar(20)"`
	LeaveDate       time.Time `json:"leave_date" gorm:"not null;type:date"`
	DeductionAmount float64   `json:"deduction_amount" gorm:"not null"`

	// Relationships
	Payslip Payslip   `gorm:"foreignKey:PayslipID;constraint:OnUpdate:CASCADE,OnDelete:CASCADE;"`
	Leave   UserLeave `gorm:"foreignKey:LeaveID;constraint:OnUpdate:CASCADE,OnDelete:RESTRICT;"`
}

package models

import (
	"database/sql"
	"time"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type SteelInventoryCategory struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID uint   `json:"organisation_id" gorm:"uniqueIndex:uniq_name_per_org"`
	Name           string `json:"name" gorm:"uniqueIndex:uniq_name_per_org"`
	Description    string `json:"description"`
	IsActive       bool   `json:"is_active"`
	CreatedBy      uint   `json:"created_by"`
}

type SteelGrade struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID uint   `json:"organisation_id" gorm:"index:uniq_grade_per_org"`
	Name           string `json:"name" gorm:"index:uniq_grade_per_org"`
	IsActive       bool   `json:"is_active"`
	CreatedBy      uint   `json:"created_by"`
}

type SteelFinish struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID uint   `json:"organisation_id" gorm:"index:uniq_finish_per_org"`
	Name           string `json:"name" gorm:"index:uniq_finish_per_org"`
	IsActive       bool   `json:"is_active"`
	CreatedBy      uint   `json:"created_by"`
}

type SteelProduct struct {
	gorm.Model
	Length         float64                `json:"length"`
	Width          float64                `json:"width"`
	Thickness      float64                `json:"thickness"`
	OrganisationID uint                   `json:"organisation_id" gorm:"index"`
	GradeID        uint                   `json:"grade_id" gorm:"index"`
	Grade          SteelGrade             `gorm:"foreignKey:GradeID" json:"grade"`
	FinishID       uint                   `json:"finish_id" gorm:"index"`
	Finish         SteelFinish            `gorm:"foreignKey:FinishID" json:"finish"` // Options: 0, 5, 12, 18, 28
	Edge           string                 `json:"edge"`
	Coil           bool                   `json:"coil"`
	Name           string                 `gorm:"not null;uniqueIndex:uniq_sku_per_org" json:"name"`
	SKU            string                 `gorm:"not null;uniqueIndex:uniq_sku_per_org" json:"sku"`
	Description    string                 `json:"description"`
	CategoryID     uint                   `json:"category_id"`
	Category       SteelInventoryCategory `gorm:"foreignKey:CategoryID" json:"category"`
	HSN            int32                  `gorm:"not null" json:"hsn"` // Mandatory field with 4-8 numeric values
	SellingMargin  float64                `json:"selling_margin"`      // Selling margin as a percentage
	CGST           float64                `json:"cgst"`                // Options: 0, 2.5, 6, 9, 14
	SGST           float64                `json:"sgst"`                // Options: 0, 2.5, 6, 9, 14
	IGST           float64                `json:"igst"`                // Options: 0, 5, 12, 18, 28
	IsActive       bool                   `json:"is_active"`
}

type SteelProductLedger struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID   uint       `json:"organisation_id"`
	SteelProductID   uint       `gorm:"not null" json:"steel_product_id"`
	Transaction_type uint       `json:"transaction_type"`
	Price            uint       `json:"price"`
	Quantity         uint       `json:"quantity"`
	PONumber         string     `json:"po_number"`
	Status           string     `json:"status"`
	CreatedBy        int        `json:"created_by"`
	CreatedByUser    UserDetail `gorm:"foreignKey:CreatedBy" json:"created_by_user"`
}

type SteelProductEntry struct {
	gorm.Model
	SteelProductID  uint       `gorm:"not null" json:"steel_product_id"`
	Quantity        int        `json:"quantity"`
	ReferenceNumber string     `json:"reference_number"`
	CreatedBy       int        `json:"created_by"`
	CreatedByUser   UserDetail `gorm:"foreignKey:CreatedBy" json:"created_by_user"`
	Status          string     `json:"status"` // Confirmed, Quotationed
}

type SteelQuotation struct {
	gorm.Model
	OrganisationID     uint                 `json:"organisation_id"`
	CustomerID         uint                 `gorm:"not null" json:"customer_id"`
	CustomerModel      CustomerModel        `gorm:"foreignKey:CustomerID" json:"customer"`
	SteelQuotationDate time.Time            `json:"quotation_date"`
	ValidUntil         time.Time            `json:"valid_until"`
	PONumber           string               `json:"po_number"`
	Remarks            string               `json:"remarks"`
	Status             string               `gorm:"default:Open" json:"status"` // Open, Accepted, Rejected
	Loading            float64              `gorm:"default:0" json:"loading"`
	Freight            float64              `gorm:"default:0" json:"freight"`
	Pallet             float64              `gorm:"default:0" json:"pallet"`
	LoadingTax         float64              `gorm:"default:0" json:"loading_tax"`
	FreightTax         float64              `gorm:"default:0" json:"freight_tax"`
	PalletTax          float64              `gorm:"default:0" json:"pallet_tax"`
	TotalAmount        float64              `json:"total_amount"`
	Items              []SteelQuotationItem `json:"items"`
}

type SteelQuotationItem struct {
	CreatedAt        time.Time
	UpdatedAt        time.Time
	DeletedAt        sql.NullTime `gorm:"index"`
	ID               uint         `gorm:"primaryKey" json:"id"`
	OrganisationID   uint         `json:"organisation_id"`
	SteelQuotationID uint         `gorm:"not null" json:"quotation_id"`
	SKU              string       `json:"sku"`
	SteelProductID   uint         `json:"steel_product_id"`
	SteelProductName string       `json:"steel_product_name"`
	Quantity         int32        `json:"quantity"`
	UnitPrice        float64      `json:"unit_price"`
	Note             string       `json:"note"`
	Total            float64      `json:"total"`
	HSN              int32        `json:"hsn"`         // HSN code (max 8 digits)
	CGST             float64      `json:"cgst"`        // CGST percentage
	SGST             float64      `json:"sgst"`        // SGST percentage
	IGST             float64      `json:"igst"`        // IGST percentage
	CGSTAmount       float64      `json:"cgst_amount"` // Calculated CGST amount
	SGSTAmount       float64      `json:"sgst_amount"` // Calculated SGST amount
	IGSTAmount       float64      `json:"igst_amount"` // Calculated IGST amount
	CreatedBy        int          `json:"created_by"`
}

type SteelProductWithQty struct {
	Product  SteelProduct `json:"product"`
	Quantity int          `json:"quantity"` // available (incoming - outgoing - blocked)
	Blocked  int          `json:"blocked"`
	Price    uint         `json:"price"` // latest ledger price if any
}

import 'package:ai_health/src/features/read_health_records/widgets/health_record_list_tiles/series_health_record_list_tiles/power_series_list_tile.dart';
import 'package:ai_health/src/features/read_health_records/widgets/health_record_list_tiles/series_health_record_list_tiles/speed_activity_list_tile.dart';
import 'package:ai_health/src/features/read_health_records/widgets/health_record_list_tiles/series_health_record_list_tiles/speed_series_list_tile.dart';

@immutable
final class HealthRecordListTile extends StatelessWidget {
  const HealthRecordListTile({
    required this.record,
    required this.onDelete,
    super.key,
  });

  final HealthRecord record;
  final VoidCallback onDelete;

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    final tile = switch (record) {
      // Blood-related records
      final BloodGlucoseRecord r => BloodGlucoseTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final BloodPressureRecord r => BloodPressureTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final SystolicBloodPressureRecord r => SystolicBloodPressureTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final DiastolicBloodPressureRecord r => DiastolicBloodPressureTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),

      // Heart rate records
      final HeartRateSeriesRecord r => HeartRateSeriesTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final HeartRateRecord r => HeartRateMeasurementTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final RestingHeartRateRecord r =>
        SimpleInstantMeasurementListTile<RestingHeartRateRecord>(
          record: r,
          icon: AppIcons.favorite,
          titleBuilder: (r) =>
              '${r.rate.inPerMinute.toStringAsFixed(0)} '
              '${AppTexts.bpm}',
          valueExtractor: (r) => r.rate,
          onDelete: onDelete,
        ),
      final HeartRateVariabilityRMSSDRecord r => HeartRateVariabilityRMSSDTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final CyclingPedalingCadenceRecord r =>
        CyclingPedalingCadenceMeasurementTile(record: r, onDelete: onDelete),
      final CyclingPedalingCadenceSeriesRecord r =>
        CyclingPedalingCadenceSeriesTile(record: r, onDelete: onDelete),
      final HeartRateVariabilitySDNNRecord r =>
        SimpleInstantMeasurementListTile<HeartRateVariabilitySDNNRecord>(
          record: r,
          icon: AppIcons.favorite,
          titleBuilder: (r) => '${r.sdnn.inMilliseconds.toStringAsFixed(1)} ms',
          valueExtractor: (r) => r.sdnn,
          onDelete: onDelete,
        ),

      // Respiratory records
      final RespiratoryRateRecord r => RespiratoryRateTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),

      // Sleep records
      final SleepSessionRecord r => SleepSessionTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final SleepStageRecord r => SleepStageTile(record: r, onDelete: onDelete),

      // Exercise records
      final ExerciseSessionRecord r => ExerciseSessionTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final MindfulnessSessionRecord r => MindfulnessSessionListTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),

      // Speed records
      final SpeedSeriesRecord r => SpeedSeriesTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),

      // Power records
      final PowerSeriesRecord r => PowerSeriesTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final CyclingPowerRecord r => SimpleInstantMeasurementListTile(
        record: r,
        icon: AppIcons.power,
        titleBuilder: (r) => '${r.power.inWatts.toStringAsFixed(1)} W',
        valueExtractor: (r) => r.power,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),

      final WalkingSpeedRecord r => SpeedActivityTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final RunningSpeedRecord r => SpeedActivityTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final StairAscentSpeedRecord r => SpeedActivityTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final StairDescentSpeedRecord r => SpeedActivityTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),

      // Body measurement records
      final BodyTemperatureRecord r =>
        SimpleInstantMeasurementListTile<BodyTemperatureRecord>(
          record: r,
          icon: AppIcons.temperature,
          titleBuilder: (r) =>
              '${r.temperature.inCelsius.toStringAsFixed(1)} °C',
          valueExtractor: (r) => r.temperature,
          onDelete: onDelete,
        ),
      final BasalBodyTemperatureRecord r => BasalBodyTemperatureTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final HeightRecord r => SimpleInstantMeasurementListTile<HeightRecord>(
        record: r,
        icon: AppIcons.height,
        titleBuilder: (r) => '${r.height.inMeters.toStringAsFixed(2)} m',
        valueExtractor: (r) => r.height,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final WeightRecord r => SimpleInstantMeasurementListTile<WeightRecord>(
        record: r,
        icon: AppIcons.monitorWeight,
        titleBuilder: (r) => '${r.weight.inKilograms.toStringAsFixed(1)} kg',
        valueExtractor: (r) => r.weight,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final BodyFatPercentageRecord r =>
        SimpleInstantMeasurementListTile<BodyFatPercentageRecord>(
          record: r,
          icon: AppIcons.percent,
          titleBuilder: (r) => '${r.percentage.asWhole.toStringAsFixed(1)} %',
          valueExtractor: (r) => r.percentage,
          onDelete: onDelete,
        ),
      final LeanBodyMassRecord r =>
        SimpleInstantMeasurementListTile<LeanBodyMassRecord>(
          record: r,
          icon: AppIcons.fitnessCenter,
          titleBuilder: (r) => '${r.mass.inKilograms.toStringAsFixed(2)} kg',
          valueExtractor: (r) => r.mass,
          onDelete: onDelete,
        ),
      final BoneMassRecord r => BoneMassTile(record: r, onDelete: onDelete),
      final BodyWaterMassRecord r => BodyWaterMassTile(
        record: r,
        onDelete: onDelete,
      ),
      final BodyMassIndexRecord r =>
        SimpleInstantMeasurementListTile<BodyMassIndexRecord>(
          record: r,
          icon: AppIcons.monitorWeight,
          titleBuilder: (r) => '${r.bmi.value.toStringAsFixed(1)} kg/m²',
          valueExtractor: (r) => r.bmi,
          onDelete: onDelete,
        ),
      final WaistCircumferenceRecord r =>
        SimpleInstantMeasurementListTile<WaistCircumferenceRecord>(
          record: r,
          icon: AppIcons.straighten,
          titleBuilder: (r) =>
              '${r.circumference.inCentimeters.toStringAsFixed(1)} cm',
          valueExtractor: (r) => r.circumference,
          onDelete: onDelete,
        ),

      // Vitals
      final OxygenSaturationRecord r =>
        SimpleInstantMeasurementListTile<OxygenSaturationRecord>(
          record: r,
